title: WIN-028 defense preemption: 180° framing unsourced + tolerance vagueness
target: WIN-028 detail_evidence — dome publishes no explicit 180° tolerance; our 15.6% deviation from 180° is based on an implied 180° commitment. Dome defender says we invented the 180° specification. Analyst Mode 3: (1) reframe evidence to handle both readings: 'as exact 180° (fails at 15.6%) AND as approximate (fails because closest approach is 152°, not 180°±tolerance the dome never specified)'; (2) document agonic line update (~95–100°W, already patched) and add note that even prior ~80°W only grazed the western edge — current ~95–100°W makes the case stronger.
